All Classes|All Packages

A

AbstractACNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode> - Interface in trienodes
The AbstractACNodeFactory defines the interface NodeFactories need to implement in order to create suffix trie nodes that may be used in the AhoCorasickStringMatcher DFA.
actrie - package actrie
 
ACTrieNode - Class in trienodes
The basic Aho-Corasick supporting Trie Node - It keeps track of all transitions, failure paths and can be used to create a DFA.
ACTrieNode(LanguageParameter, boolean, char) - Constructor for class trienodes.ACTrieNode
 
ACTrieNodeFactory - Class in trienodes
The default ACTrieNodeFactory which generates standard ACTrieNodes.
ACTrieNodeFactory() - Constructor for class trienodes.ACTrieNodeFactory
 
AhoCorasickTrie<nodeType extends ACTrieNode> - Class in actrie
Represents and builds an AhoCorasickTrie.
AhoCorasickTrieFactory - Class in actrie
A Factory to create AhoCorasickTries.
AhoCorasickTrieFactory() - Constructor for class actrie.AhoCorasickTrieFactory
 
alphabet - package alphabet
